title: manettia lehmannii
intro: Manettia lehmannii, also known as the Colombian firecracker, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Manettia lehmannii include its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
